pi_items.source: Cannot verify without task execution; this is a target output, not an input
NinjaTrader 8 uses HHmmss format for time; https://forum.ninjatrader.com/forum/ninjatrader-8/add-on-development/1232580-session-times-hhmmss
NHmmss format; 120000 = 12 hours, 00 minutes, 00 seconds in 24-hour format
https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/AAPL/; multiple financial data providers confirm AAPL is Apple Inc.

pi_items.verified_value: C:\Users\[Username]\Documents\NinjaTrader 8 is the default NinjaTrader 8 directory

privileged_info_summary: The task involves creating a trading hours template in NinjaTrader 8 for AAPL stock data. The template 'US Morning Session' is specified with trading hours from 09:30 (9:30 AM) to 12:00 (12:00 PM) Eastern Time, which are valid custom session hours within the US trading day. AAPL is Apple Inc., traded on NASDAQ. The environment uses real historical AAPL stock data from 2023-2024 sourced from Yahoo Finance. The NinjaTrader 8 user directory is correctly specified as C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8, which is the default location for the Docker user account on Windows.
